response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., DLang, CI/CD infrastructure)
Proven ability to lead complex projects and create developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a mandatory requirement
No experience with LAN-switch products, embedded security features, or networking protocols like SNMP/NETCONF

key_factors.factor: No security or switch firmware background
